programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.desc: Loki arrives at Avengers Tower declaring he wants to be an Avenger. Our heroes are skeptical, but Iron Man decides to make Loki an ”Avenger In Training”. It's a great plan until Thanos arrives on Earth looking for Loki

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Gorilla's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue. The only problem is that the Lions don't like water ... at all!

programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible - but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.desc: Robotnik invents a robot coach -- the "Coachnik", to put S and G through a "Training Camp" to improve their skills. Then Coachnik puts a bomb in Grounder's head as a booby trap for Sonic, and a football game ensues with Grounder's head as the ball.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a flute-playing Ninja crane, taps his martial arts knowledge, and transfers it to Scratch and Grounder.

programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: As Kord, Trixie and Pronto struggle to keep the wily Elemental Slugs out of the wrong hands, Eli and Junjie's Slug Fu training is cut short by a madman.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines-the Pyritor. Trixie studies the legend to help them locate the creature's home and put a stop to its reign of terror, but first they must confront the true nature of the beast, and its assistant!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious "Giver," who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East. But when a group of thieves make off with the Giver's precious cargo of slugs, our heroes must ride to the rescue-and discover the secret of who the Giver really is.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns. The Shane Gang search for a way to defeat the new creations, but when the Emperor places a bounty on Junjie's head, they also have to deal with the Dai-Fu and hordes of the Emperor's Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs-in Eli's absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos! It's up to Eli to restore the balance, but the Shadow Clan aren't as friendly as they once were...and that's saying something. Help comes from an unexpected source-Tad and his slug Pieper, who just arrived from the Surface!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and Misty's rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile's new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock's Vulpix and Ash's Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash's Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill's heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it's just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some "professional actors," the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn't long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak's discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies

Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. programme.title: Genevieve's Playhouse
programme.desc: Join the Paw Patrol on a hot day as they learn about money and responsibility in this fun and educational video for kids! programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.desc: Una famosa celebridad necesita un descanso, por lo que conduce a un refugio en la montaña. En su camino hacia allá, una tormenta de nieve la saca de la carretera y se accidenta. Cuando vuelve en sí, tiene amnesia y un transeúnte amistoso la acoge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan viajan a un Manhattan posapocalíptico aislado del continente hace mucho tiempo la ciudad en ruinas está llena de muertos y habitantes que han hecho de Nueva York un mundo lleno de anarquía, peligro, belleza y terror.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan viajan a un Manhattan posapocalíptico aislado del continente hace mucho tiempo la ciudad en ruinas está llena de muertos y habitantes que han hecho de Nueva York un mundo lleno de anarquía, peligro, belleza y terror.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie busca a Negan para que la ayude a salvar a su hijo, al que ha secuestrado un sádico superviviente, al que llaman el Croata, que vive en Manhattan. Negan accede a acompañarla a cambio de que permita a Ginny integrarse en su comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Una anciana ayuda a Maggie y Negan a escapar de los zombis y los conduce hasta su tribu, a la cual los soldados del Croata tratan de exterminar. Negan revela que conoce al Croata: trabajó a sus órdenes hasta que lo expulsó por ser demasiado sádico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: La tribu les explica a Maggie y Negan el modus operandi de los Burazi, el cual ellos reconocen idéntico al que usaban antes los Salvadores, por lo que saben cómo atacarlos. Luther descubre que se ofrece una recompensa por Negan y lo ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan llevan a cabo un ataque, pero no todo sale de acuerdo al plan. Ginny y Armstrog tienen inesperados contactos con otros.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.sub-title: Historias que nos contamos a nosotros mismos
programme.desc: Negan y Perlie se realizan confesiones mutuas mientras se abren paso por Manhattan. Maggie llega a la conclusión de que Tommaso traicionó a la tribu y provocó el ataque en el Madison Square Garden. Tommaso admite que llegó a un acuerdo con el Croata.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: La tensión entre Maggie y Negan alcanza el punto máximo. Continúa la búsqueda de Ginny. Surgen preguntas sobre el camino a seguir por Armstrong.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.sub-title: Salvador en el ojo del huracán
programme.desc: Cantú y Robles llegan con una orden de allanamiento al taller de Salvador Terán. Revuelven todo, buscan la conexión que Sasha encontró entre Eric Bernard, el empresario canadiense y su jefe.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: A Matilde le tortura la idea de no volver a ver a su hijo, y el Chema le sugiere que lo secuestre. Leonor desconfía del suicidio del padre Lázaro: le pide a Garnica que presione a los Casillas.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Victoria y Danilo se besan, y ella no sospecha que se está enamorando de Aurelio Casillas. Ambos confiesan sentirse atraídos el uno por el otro. Mónica confirma su embarazo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica quiere sorprender a Aurelio con su embarazo, pero se lo encuentra en la cama con Victoria. Se hace pasar por su hermana y, a solas, jura no perdonarlo si él se enamora de otra.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decirle cuánto la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia ordena la muerte de Julio.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Mientras agoniza, Julio repite insistentemente el nombre de Gabriela Suárez, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia lo advierte.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro: El socio de Eliza propone boda
programme.desc: Para resolver su situación legal, Andrés propone casarse con Eliza y así, ella y su familia podrán defenderse ante cualquier demanda de Jennifer y Max. Raquel viaja escondida en un camión.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Manuel se sacrifica y le hace una propuesta a Antonio José en su cara, fluye el arrepentimiento y surge una oportunidad para las Villaseñor. Antonio y Chivis se reúnen en medio de gran tensión.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Antonio se sincera con Chivis y la toma desprevenida con una proposición. Stella regresa con náuseas de Las Vegas. Angie alcanza el mejor puntaje en la prueba de aptitud académica de Florida.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Chivis resuelve darle un giro a su vida y va en busca de Manuel para contarle la noticia, Antonio no se va del país. Stella confirma que está embarazada y piensa en el nombre del bebé.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Una ceremonia en la terminal sella el amor entre Chivis y Manuel. Lucía asiste al acto y Vicente aprovecha para darle a Majo el anillo de compromiso. Poncho acepta ser el sucesor de Manuel.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Lucía intenta hacer las paces con Majo antes de irse a México. Las Villaseñor buscan a Antonio, quien no contesta las llamadas telefónicas. Don Benito le pide a Chivis la mano de Trini.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Stella visita a Chivis en la mansión, le pide perdón y se ofrece como su aliada para recuperar a Manuel. Chivis tiene su primera junta como decoradora. Lucía tiene el equipaje preparado.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana

programme.desc: La bióloga marina Dra. Sylvia Earle revela por qué la contaminación de los océanos y la sobrepesca podrían tener un impacto devastador

programme.title: El Ascenso y la Caída del T-Rex
programme.desc: Dos científicos investigaron el misterio del Tiranosaurio Rex y su repentina muerte y descubrieron el día que dio forma al mundo moderno.

programme.title: Cómo Ven los Animales

programme.desc: Prudencia cree que Josefina sabe que Pablo y Julia son novios y está decidida a separarlos. Julia se burla de Prudencia al verla hablar con un hombre que dice ser su amigo, pero Julia le dice que quiere ser su pretendiente.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Dinorah le dice a Guillermo que no puede enamorarse de ella porque es una mujer casada. Prudencia le dice a Pablo que no merece el amor de Julia y le exige que se aleje de ella si no la ama de verdad.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.sub-title: Fragmentos de una mente sin recuerdo
programme.desc: Roberta le avisa a Agustín que Renata y Jerónimo irán juntos a una boda. Matilde le reclama a Carlos el no haberle dicho que Marina está embarazada de Jerónimo.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Matías decide ayudar a Adriana en su plan con Chema. Chema tiene un desmayo y comienza a preocuparse por su salud. Inicia el juicio contra Fina y con ello un recuento por sus fechorías.

programme.title: El asesino se embarca
programme.desc: Un grupo de personas que no trabaja en el mismo lugar, intenta conseguir unas placas para falsificar dinero.

programme.title: Balún Canán
programme.desc: Unos brujos condenan a una mujer a un destino feroz porque hizo cosas crueles para conservar su finca.

programme.title: Chiquidrácula
programme.desc: Un abuelo alcohólico enferma gravemente. Su médico dice que sólo un gran susto puede curarlo y su nieto decide dárselo.

programme.title: Doctor Satán y la magia negra
programme.desc: Debido a una venganza, el dios del vudú ordena a su gran sacerdote ir a la Tierra para destruir a un vampiro oriental.

programme.title: La mujer y la bestia
programme.desc: Tras la violación de su hija por parte de varios trabajadores ferroviarios, una enfermera se convierte por las noches en una letal prostituta que asesina a hombres.

programme.title: Sublime melodía
programme.desc: Una joven viuda le pide a su suegra que cuide a su pequeña hija para que viva con el recuerdo de su padre.

programme.title: Los olvidados
programme.desc: Una historia de Luis Buñuel, acerca de la pobreza y el crimen juvenil en los suburbios de la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: La liga de las muchachas
programme.desc: Una mujer funda una liga femenina para luchar contra la tiranía masculina y sus esposos tratan de hacerlas cambiar de parecer.

programme.title: Lágrimas de amor
programme.desc: Un viudo, cajero de un banco, es manipulado por una mala mujer, a quien termina matando y le echa la culpa a otro.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Pedro queda viudo justo cuando su mujer acababa de tener un hijo. Tras este terrible suceso, su hermano y su esposa intentan aprovecharse de él. Después de un tiempo se da cuenta que su hermano no hace nada y se está aprovechando de él.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven se obsesiona con su profesor y trata de tener una relación con él, pero él la rechaza. La chica hace unas pruebas falsas para que todos crean que él trató de seducirla.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Don Tomás y su esposa Lupe están por inaugurar su cafetería, mientras eligen el nombre que llevará, ella sufre un desmayo y la llevan al hospital. Lupe muere y después de un triste funeral, los hijos de Don Tomás deciden con quién se quedará.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven es desalojado de su casa porque su madre la hipotecó y nunca hizo ningún pago. Su madre sufre un accidente y pierde la memoria él cree que lo abandonó, sus vecinos lo ayudan y le dan hospedaje en su casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Miriam es una adolescente que, por falta de atención de sus padres, cae en una broma pesada por internet. El padre de Miriam es aficionado a ver páginas en internet de adolescentes y encuentra las fotos de su hija en una página prohibida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Sebastian es un joven pintor que quiere conseguir a la mejor modelo para el concurso anual de retrato desnudo de la academia donde estudia. Sin embargo se enamora de María Domínguez lo cual provoca una disputa con Gala.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Dime de que presumes y te diré de que careces
programme.desc: Diana es una chica que se lastima a sí misma para llamar la atención y sentir un alivio ante los problemas que existen en su casa. Diana se enamora de Adrián, un nuevo compañero de la escuela pero provoca los celos de Rebeca, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven se dedica a vender drogas en su escuela, un profesor se entera y lo denuncia. El joven les cuenta a los hombres que le venden la droga sobre su profesor y ellos lo golpean hasta dejarlo inconsciente.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: El grupo Bronco llega al escenario para cantar sus más grandes éxitos. Los Pequeños Gigantes realizan espectaculares actuaciones en la pista de baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños bailarines se enfrentan en una prueba de mambo. El cantante Christian Nodal se presenta en el escenario. Albertano sorprende en el programa.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La cantante internacional Filippa Giordano se presenta en el escenario. Los capitanes se enfrentan en una prueba de preguntas y respuestas. Se vive la segunda eliminación de la competencia.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: El cantante Flex se presenta en el escenario de Pequeños Gigantes. Los bailarines se enfrentan con ritmos de cumbia y merengue. Los capitanes concursan con los jueces en pruebas de habilidad y destreza.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Monterrey es un lugar con muchas mujeres desaparecidas, jóvenes que salieron de sus casas y no volvieron. Ahora, sus padres están desconsolados y en busca de justicia.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En una entrevista, el Papa Francisco da un regalo a los mexicanos con una charla amena donde fija la postura de la iglesia católica ante diferentes temas como la migración.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Monseñor Oscar Romero es mostrado como el hombre de la iglesia de los pobres, se le dio el calificativo de Romero Mártir por lo que se puede ser beatificado sin la necesidad de haber hecho un milagro.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desde una sobrecargo hasta una mariachi narran su experiencia en una vida donde no saben quiénes son. Personas transgénero que han nacido atrapados en un cuerpo que no es el suyo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Madres que vieron a sus hijos triunfar en el mundo del espectáculo cuentan sus historias, el éxito en la niñez donde se vuelven estrellas es un mundo en el que las madres ven a sus hijos como sus pequeños.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Cordero y Venado se convirtieron en mejores amigos cuando iban a Estados Unidos como ilegales. Un coyote los vendió a una banda de traficantes de humanos y la familia de Venado pagó por su rescate.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El líder del cártel de Sinaloa se fuga por segunda vez de una prisión federal en México. Sigue la búsqueda de Joaquín Guzmán Loera, en esta historia se tiene acceso total al lugar de donde se fugó "El Chapo" después de un año y cuatro meses.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El escándalo de la fuga de Joaquín Guzmán, quien escapó de una celda de 3x2 metros y que logró burlar los sistemas de seguridad de la prisión del Altiplano.

programme.title: John Coltrane, McCoy Tyner, Elvin Jones & Jimmy Garrison
programme.desc: The mere mention of the name John Coltrane evokes a deeply emotional, often spiritual response from even the most casual jazz fan. Dexter Gordon was a fantastic saxophonist. Miles Davis was a genius. Coltrane stood above - he was a visionary, a saint-like figure. By the standards of most jazz musicians, his life was uneventful. Sure, he had a heroin habit for a while, and Miles Davis punched him, but once he'd experienced the “spiritual awakening” described in the liner notes of his 1965 album A Love Supreme, he dedicated himself to his music with extreme single-mindedness. This broadcast of Coltrane's 1965 performance at the short-lived Belgian jazz festival in Comblain-la-Tour features Trane's classic quartet with Elvin Jones (drums), Jimmy Garrison (bass) and McCoy Tyner (piano).

programme.title: Keith Jarrett
programme.desc: Lugano Estival Jazz is an annual open-air music festival that takes place over five days at the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. On July 3, 1986, American pianist and composer Keith Jarrett is joined by bassist Gary Peacock and drummer Jack DeJohnette at Estival Jazz Lugano. Known as the Standards Trio, they put on an enthralling performance that shows these master musicians at their best.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.sub-title: Josh Evans - Ballad Of Ernie Washington
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Charles Bradley
programme.desc: On April 26, 2012, the world-famous vocalist Charles Bradley and his Extraordinaires grace the stage of the Cigale in Paris. Success did not come easily for the American. Before Bradley (1948-2017) even considered a career as a singer, he tried to make ends meet with countless odd jobs. Only in 1996 he finally followed in the footsteps of his great idol, soul icon James Brown. Brown and Bradley shared the talent to bring an audience to ecstasy. With his mix of funk, soul, and R&B, Bradley has developed a sound of his own, in which a keen ear might find a few traces of James Brown.

programme.title: George Benson & Earl Klugh
programme.sub-title: George Benson and Earl Klugh - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, prominent guitarist George Benson brought his band to kick off day three of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Joining him to play songs from their joint album "Collaborations" was Grammy award–winning acoustic guitarist Earl Klugh.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Popa Chubby
programme.sub-title: Popa Chubby - It's A Mighty Hard Road
programme.desc: Popa Chubby, born as Ted Horowitz, is an American blues singer and guitarist, who has become one of the most popular figures of New York's blues scene. Early on in his career he released the album 'Booty and the Beast' (1995), which became one of the 1990s's best-selling blues albums. Chubby describes his own style as "The Stooges meets Buddy Guy, Motörhead meets Muddy Waters, and Jimi Hendrix meets Robert Johnson". As part of the French music festival Blues sur Seine, Chubby and his band played a great blues rock concert, showcasing the artist's powerful and soulful guitar playing. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Simone Signoret on November 8, 2019.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 1 in F major, Op. 18, No. 1 String Quartet No. 10 in E-flat major, Op. 74, "Harp" and String Quartet No. 9 in C major, Op. 59, No. 3, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 13, 2020.

programme.title: Thomas Zehetmair, Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: Iván Fischer conducts the Budapest Festival Orchestra in a concert recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary in 2015. The concert opens with Sergei Prokofiev's Overture on Hebrew Themes, Op. 34. After this, Thomas Zehetmair stars as solo violinist in Prokofiev Violin Concerto No. 2, Op. 63. The second part of the concert is features music by Igor Stravinsky. On the program is music composed for the ballet 'Jeu de cartes' (1937) and the Firebird Suite, No. 2 (1919). 'Jeu de cartes' is one of Stravinsky's neo-classical works and consists of three parts ('deals'). The Firebird Suite, No. 2 is based on the music from the ballet of the same name, which was written for Sergei Diaghilev's Ballets Russes and premiered in Paris in 1910.

programme.title: Myung-whun Chung, Orchestra del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino, Coro del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino & Christiane Karg
programme.desc: Maestro Myung-Whun Chung leads the Orchestra and Chorus of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino, along with two vocal soloists, in this impressive performance of Gustav Mahler's Symphony No. 2 in C minor, ‘Resurrection'. Soprano Christiane Karg and alto Claudia Huckle are the soloists. Written between 1888 and 1894, this five-movement symphony is scored for a large orchestra, chorus, and soprano and alto soloists. Mahler explores themes of life, death, and resurrection throughout the symphony. Its first movement resembles a funeral march, while the second, a graceful Ländler, creates a stark contrast with the somber character of the first. The third movement is a Scherzo based on Mahler's musical setting of ‘Des Antonius von Padua Fischpredigt' from the collection Des Knaben Wunderhorn. The composer also used another Wunderhorn poem, ‘Urlicht' (Primal Light), for the fourth movement, incorporating both text and music, sung by the alto. The chorus makes its entrance in the second part of the fifth and final movement with the ‘Resurrection' chorale. This performance was recorded at Teatro del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino in Florence, Italy, in 2021.

programme.title: Les Arts Florissants & Paul Agnew
programme.desc: Italian composer Claudio Monteverdi (1567-1643) composed nine books of madrigals in half a century, which helped transform the genre from the polyphonic, a cappella madrigals of the late Renaissance to the ‘concertato' madrigals of the early Baroque, shifting the style's focus to the ability of music to express emotions contained in a text. In 2011, British tenor Paul Agnew and renowned Baroque ensemble Les Arts Florissants started recording eight books of Monteverdi's madrigals. In this program, Agnew leads Les Arts Florissants in the madrigals of Book I. Published on New Year's day of 1587, Book I consist of seventeen madrigals for five voices. This performance was recorded at the Cité de la musique in Paris, France, in 2011.

programme.title: Russian National Orchestra & Mikhail Pletnev
programme.desc: Russian conductor and pianist Mikhail Pletnev leads the Russian National Orchestra in performances of Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov's music. On the program are Suite for Orchestra after the opera 'The Legend of the Invisible City of Kitezh and the Maiden Fevroniya', and Musical Pictures for Orchestra from the opera 'The Tale of Tsar Saltan'. Part of the latter is the famous 'Flight of the Bumblebee'. This concert was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall of the Russian Philharmonic Society in 2017.
